element.name: TAudiosSQL
element.short: SQL generator for the audio_library table.

descr.p: This class implements the IAudiosSQL interface and provides SQL statements used to manage the audio_library table. It supports multiple database backends through the TDatabaseBackend parameter.
Initializes the SQL generator for the audio_library table and stores the selected database backend. The backend determines which SQL syntax variations will be used when generating queries.

element.name: TAudiosSQL.Create.ABackend
element.short: Specifies the database backend (SQLite, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, Firebird).

element.name: TAudiosSQL.CreateTable
element.short: Returns the SQL statement to create the audio_library table.

element.name: TAudiosSQL.SelectTable
element.short: Returns a SELECT statement for internal table queries.

descr.p: The WHERE clause is dynamically appended based on the TSQLWhereClause parameter, allowing filtering by ID, active status, marked status, or arbitrary field/value pairs.

element.name: TAudiosSQL.SelectAll
element.short: Returns a SELECT statement for table‑view queries.

descr.p: The WHERE clause is dynamically appended based on the TSQLWhereClause parameter, allowing filtering by ID, active status, marked status, or arbitrary field/value pairs.

element.name: TAudiosSQL.Insert
element.short: Returns an INSERT statement for adding a new audio record.

element.name: TAudiosSQL.Update
element.short: Returns an UPDATE statement for modifying an audio record.

element.name: TAudiosSQL.Delete
element.short: Returns a DELETE statement for removing an audio record.
